rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MICHAEL COOMBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Determining That Respondent Cunningham Is Not Entitled To A Homestead Exemption; Memorandijm Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of J. Scott Mckay
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 1. PETITIONERs MICHAEL COOMBS and TAMARA WOODS' Motion For Order Determining That Respondent Cunningham Is Not Entitled To A Homestead Exemption GRANTED, subject to opposition and resolution of appeal. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN J. COYNE ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFFs HOWARD WESTON, MARTIN COYNE, EDMUND CHUTE and SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE's Petition For Writ Of Mandate Continued to September 24, 2105 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMANDA F. SWAIN VS. JOHN R. MONTGOMERY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action And Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 3. CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHN MONTGOMERY's Motion To Stay Action And Compel Arbitration DENIED. Moving party delayed for long period of time (over one year) before seeking a stay and arbitration. Moving party fails to provide any evidence that arbitration was requested after mediation failed. Additionally, proposed First Amended Complaint is not the operative complaint in this action. The operative complaint is not based on the breach of the contract containing an arbitration provision. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTs ED KOSTER and JENNIFER KOMM's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to conspiracy/agency liability (allegations in paragraph 4 are not sufficient; reference of San Jose/Santa Clara is unclear) or allege facts to support each cause of action as to each defendant without reliance on agency/conspiracy. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN A MULLER VS. MAXINE E NILSEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgement; Separate Statement Of Material Facts; Supporting Memorandum; Request For Judicial Notice; And Supporting Evidence
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANTs MAXINE NILSEN, LARRY NILSEN and MARK MULLER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding ownership of the property by partnership (Partnership Agreement at III) or by individual partners (Deeds). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOI YUEN CHOW ET AL VS. NU MAC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaitiff'S Prayer For Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTs NU MAC and CAU QUAN QUAN's Motion To Strike Plaitiff's Prayer For Attorney Fees DENIED, attorney's fess provisions in the lease covers all disputes arising out of the lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOI YUEN CHOW ET AL VS. NU MAC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTs NU MAC, CAU QUAN QUAN, AHN LOAN NGUYEN, QUE BINH QUAN, CAU MAN QUAN, WENDY DANG and BINH QUAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff complied with SFRO 37.9A(f)(5). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD NOVAK VS. JUDY DENISE MCCULLOUGH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT JUDY MCCULLOUGH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Overruled, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint is not uncertain and just cause under SFRO is sufficiently identified in the operative notices. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD NOVAK VS. JUDY DENISE MCCULLOUGH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT RAE JONES's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Overruled. 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint is not uncertain and just cause under SFRO is sufficiently identified in the operative notices. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALLEY LANE LLC VS. RUSSELL JELTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER LORGE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege forcible detainer elements under CCP 1160(a) or (b). If unlawful detainer is based on CCP 1160(b) expiration of 5 days must be alleged. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LOU GORDON ET AL VS. RICHARD PATRICK GORDON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Friday, September 4, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT RICHARD GORDON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and notice sufficiently assert a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on unlawful subletting. = (501/REQ)
